scripts.release: node -e "const v=process.argv[1];if(!v){console.error('Usage: pnpm release <version>');process.exit(1);}const{execSync}=require('child_process');execSync('npm version '+v+' --no-git-tag-version --workspaces',{stdio:'inherit'});execSync('git add -A && git commit -m "chore: release '+v+'" && git tag v'+v,{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('Tagged v'+v+'. Run: git push && git push --tags')" --
